home.hero.subtitle: Coming soon
prelaunch.heading: Coming soon
home.event.time.label: Time:
home.event.location.label: Venue:
home.essay.paragraph1: Sun Annual Awards 2025 returns under the theme ROOT FURTHER — celebrating those who dare to root deeply in their core values and reach further every single day.
home.essay.paragraph2: We believe every person and every team at Sun* carries a story worth telling — a story of effort, of creativity, and of perseverance.
home.essay.paragraph3: ROOT FURTHER is the moment for the Sun* community to look back on a year together, to honour the quiet contributions, and to inspire the journey ahead.
home.awards.section.caption: Awards System
home.awards.section.heading: Award Categories
home.awards.section.lead: Six categories — six journeys to shine. Explore each award and its nomination criteria.
home.awards.top_talent.title: Top Talent
home.awards.top_talent.description: Recognising the most outstanding individuals — those whose contributions inspire the Sun* community.
home.awards.top_project.title: Top Project
home.awards.top_project.description: Honouring landmark projects that delivered exceptional value to clients and to Sun* throughout 2025.
home.awards.top_project_leader.title: Top Project Leader
home.awards.top_project_leader.descripti: For Project Leaders who guided their teams through challenges and delivered remarkable results.
home.awards.best_manager.title: Best Manager
home.awards.best_manager.description: Recognising managers who inspire, nurture our Sun* culture, and grow great people.
home.awards.signature_2025_creator.title: Signature 2025 - Creator
home.awards.signature_2025_creator.descr: Celebrating the creative signature of the year — a product or initiative that carries the Sun* spirit.
home.awards.mvp.title: MVP (Most Valuable Person)
home.awards.mvp.description: Most Valuable Player — the contributor who created lasting, meaningful value for Sun* this year.
home.kudos.label: Recognition Movement
home.kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
home.kudos.description:
WHAT'S NEW IN SAA 2025
A company-wide recognition movement — the first of its kind, open to every Sunner. Launching in November 2025, the system invites Sun* people to share thanks and appreciation with colleagues. These messages will inform the Heads Council as they select this year's award recipients.
home.notification.toast.coming_soon: Feature in development. Please check back soon!
